passing_score_scale: Pass/fail; specific passing thresholds not publicly disclosed
exam_format: Linear (computer-based at AWS approved sites or Pearson VUE test centers)

testing_centers.provider: AWS Approved Exam Sites and Pearson VUE
testing_centers.notes: AWS approved exam sites and Pearson VUE test centers for computer-based portions. Practical and hands-on assessments conducted at AWS-approved facilities.

exam_rules: CWI Fundamentals: closed-book. Practical Application: closed-book. Codes and Standards: open-book (current code book required). No electronic devices except CWI-approved calculators. All 3 CWI parts must be passed within 1 year of first passing attempt.
renewal_options: 3-year renewal cycle. 80 hours of welding-related work activity required for renewal. No exam required for routine renewal — activity-based renewal only. Renewal through aws.org certification portal.

prerequisites.description: Active CWI plus 6 years experience as a CWI

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between attempts. Unlimited retakes allowed. Full fee required for each attempt. CWI: must pass all 3 parts within 1 year of passing the first part.

official_study_resources.title: AWS CWI Seminar and Study Materials
official_study_resources.notes: AWS offers preparatory seminars and official study materials; costs vary.

official_study_resources.title: AWS D1.1 Structural Welding Code — Steel
official_study_resources.notes: Required open-book reference for CWI Codes and Standards portion. Available for purchase at aws.org.
